_meta.description: Last Epoch unique item reference data for The Forge build planner.
_meta.note: Affix ranges are curated approximations. Verify against in-game tooltips for exact values.

apogee_of_frozen_light.name: Apogee of Frozen Light
apogee_of_frozen_light.unique_passive: Apogee of Frozen Light — Your Cold spells have a 25% chance to Shatter enemies on hit

vessels_of_memory.name: Vessels of Memory
vessels_of_memory.unique_passive: Vessels of Memory — Gain a stack of Memory on kill. Each stack grants +2% Spell Damage. Lose all stacks on death.

devoured_crown.name: Devoured Crown
devoured_crown.unique_passive: Devoured Crown — Your Companions deal 30% increased Damage and have 25% increased Attack Speed

frozen_skull.name: Frozen Skull
frozen_skull.unique_passive: Frozen Skull — Your Minions deal Cold Damage and apply Chill on hit
affixes: +10–20% chance to Chill on Hit for Minions

calamity.name: Calamity
calamity.unique_passive: Calamity — Your Crit Multiplier is increased by 10% for each 5% of your Critical Strike Chance above 50%

pinnacle_of_obsession.name: Pinnacle of Obsession
pinnacle_of_obsession.unique_passive: Pinnacle of Obsession — Gain 1% increased Damage for every 10 Affixes on your equipped items

the_unsung_prophet.name: The Unsung Prophet
the_unsung_prophet.unique_passive: The Unsung Prophet — Your Void skills deal bonus damage equal to 10% of your Void Protection

exsanguinous.name: Exsanguinous
exsanguinous.unique_passive: Exsanguinous — You are considered to be at Low Life if you have less than 50 Ward. Gain Ward equal to 50% of your Missing Life.
affixes: +10–20% increased Global Damage while on Low Life

last_steps_of_the_living.name: Last Steps of the Living
last_steps_of_the_living.unique_passive: Last Steps of the Living — On reaching Low Life, gain Ghost Walk for 2 seconds (5 second cooldown)
affixes: +10–20% Movement Speed while at Low Life

shroud_of_obscurity.name: Shroud of Obscurity
shroud_of_obscurity.unique_passive: Shroud of Obscurity — Enemies cannot see you while you are stationary for more than 0.5 seconds

titan_heart.name: Titan Heart
titan_heart.unique_passive: Titan Heart — Your Armor is doubled while you have not moved in the last 2 seconds

twisted_heart_of_uhkeiros.name: Twisted Heart of Uhkeiros
twisted_heart_of_uhkeiros.unique_passive: Twisted Heart of Uhkeiros — Your Skeletons explode on death dealing 100% of their Health as Physical Damage to nearby enemies

ravenous_void.name: Ravenous Void
ravenous_void.unique_passive: Ravenous Void — When you kill an enemy, heal for 3% of your Maximum Health and gain 5% increased Void Damage for 4 seconds, stacking up to 10 times

siphon_of_anguish.name: Siphon of Anguish
siphon_of_anguish.unique_passive: Siphon of Anguish — Drain Life heals for 100% more and can now target Rare and Boss enemies for double effect

the_invokers_static_touch.name: The Invoker's Static Touch
the_invokers_static_touch.unique_passive: The Invoker's Static Touch — Your Spells have a 10% chance to Echo, casting again for 30% effectiveness

erasing_strike.name: Erasing Strike
erasing_strike.unique_passive: Erasing Strike — Your Melee hits apply Void Rift, dealing Void Damage over time

grip_of_the_void.name: Grip of the Void
grip_of_the_void.unique_passive: Grip of the Void — Your Void Skills drain 5% of enemy Maximum Health on hit

forged_in_blood.name: Forged in Blood
forged_in_blood.unique_passive: Forged in Blood — Your Shield Throw has a 30% chance to return to you and be thrown again

rive.name: Rive
rive.unique_passive: Rive — Your Melee attacks Cleave enemies in a wider arc. Rive also applies Bleed on hit.

julras_stardial.name: Julra's Stardial
julras_stardial.unique_passive: Julra's Stardial — Enemies you hit have Time Rot applied to them, slowing them and reducing their damage output

tears_of_the_forest.name: Tears of the Forest
tears_of_the_forest.unique_passive: Tears of the Forest — While moving, leave a trail of Entangling Roots that lasts 3 seconds

wings_of_argentus.name: Wings of Argentus
wings_of_argentus.unique_passive: Wings of Argentus — Your Falcon has 50% increased Movement Speed and deals 20% more Damage

heorot.name: Heorot
heorot.unique_passive: Heorot — While transformed into a Werebear, your armor is doubled and you deal 25% more Damage

bleeding_heart.name: Bleeding Heart
bleeding_heart.unique_passive: Bleeding Heart — Ignite also causes enemies to Bleed. Your Ignite damage is increased by your Bleed chance.

reach_of_the_grave.name: Reach of the Grave
reach_of_the_grave.unique_passive: Reach of the Grave — Your Skeletons and Zombies have 30% increased Area of Effect and attack all enemies they pass through

mark_of_the_architect.name: Mark of the Architect
mark_of_the_architect.unique_passive: Mark of the Architect — Gain 1% of your Armor as Bonus Physical Damage

logis_hunger.name: Logi's Hunger
logis_hunger.unique_passive: Logi's Hunger — Casting Totems grants you 10% increased Damage per active Totem

dragonflame_edict.name: The Dragonflame Edict
dragonflame_edict.unique_passive: The Dragonflame Edict — Dragon Breath is added to your skill bar. It costs no Mana and deals Fire Damage.

burning_chest.name: Burning Chest
burning_chest.unique_passive: Burning Chest — Your Ignites deal 1% more Damage for each stack of Ignite on the target, up to 300%

eye_of_reen.name: Eye of Reen
eye_of_reen.unique_passive: Eye of Reen — Your Companions have 100% increased Critical Strike Chance and deal Critical Strikes for 50% increased Damage

throne_of_ambition.name: Throne of Ambition
throne_of_ambition.unique_passive: Throne of Ambition — Gain 1% increased Damage for each different Ailment type currently on your target

reign_of_winter.name: Reign of Winter
reign_of_winter.unique_passive: Reign of Winter — Chilled enemies take 20% more damage from all sources

omnis.name: Omnis
omnis.unique_passive: Omnis — Your Elemental Resistances also grant equal amounts of Elemental Damage bonus

orians_eye.name: Orian's Eye
orians_eye.unique_passive: Orian's Eye — Your Critical Strikes with Spells have a 20% chance to release a Chain Lightning bolt

shard_of_the_shattered_lance.name: Shard of the Shattered Lance
shard_of_the_shattered_lance.unique_passive: Shard of the Shattered Lance — Your Abyssal Echoes fire a lance that deals Void Damage in a line

band_of_the_broken_realm.name: Band of the Broken Realm
band_of_the_broken_realm.unique_passive: Band of the Broken Realm — Each use of Volatile Reversal grants 5% increased Void Damage for 6 seconds, stacking up to 10 times
affixes: +10–20% Movement Speed after using Volatile Reversal

echos_call.name: Echo's Call
echos_call.unique_passive: Echo's Call — Spells that Echo deal an additional 20% of their base Damage

risen_skull.name: Risen Skull
risen_skull.unique_passive: Risen Skull — Your Skeletal Mages shoot an additional projectile and have 20% increased Damage

fractured_crystalline_glyph.name: Fractured Crystalline Glyph
fractured_crystalline_glyph.unique_passive: Fractured Crystalline Glyph — Your Arcane spells create a mana shard on hit. Picking up a shard restores 20 Mana.

smoke_weaver.name: Smoke Weaver
smoke_weaver.unique_passive: Smoke Weaver — Smoke Bomb now also Poisons enemies inside it each second

lens_of_the_forgotten.name: Lens of the Forgotten
lens_of_the_forgotten.unique_passive: Lens of the Forgotten — You can see the Resistances and Ailments of enemies through walls

rahyehs_light.name: Rahyeh's Light
rahyehs_light.unique_passive: Rahyeh's Light — Your Holy Aura also grants allies 20% increased Fire Damage

harvest.name: Harvest
harvest.unique_passive: Harvest — Enemies killed by this weapon shatter and deal Physical Damage to nearby enemies

stormcarved_testament.name: Stormcarved Testament
stormcarved_testament.unique_passive: Stormcarved Testament — Your Totems also cast Lightning Bolts when you attack

famine.name: Famine
famine.unique_passive: Famine — Enemies hit by this weapon have reduced Healing received by 50%

hammer_of_lorent.name: Hammer of Lorent
hammer_of_lorent.unique_passive: Hammer of Lorent — Smite sends out 2 additional Hammers that deal 50% of base Damage

beacon_of_the_lost.name: Beacon of the Lost
beacon_of_the_lost.unique_passive: Beacon of the Lost — When you stun an enemy, release a shockwave that deals Physical Damage

reign_of_darkness.name: Reign of Darkness
reign_of_darkness.unique_passive: Reign of Darkness — Applying Poison also grants Shadow Daggers that orbit you, dealing Physical Damage

disemboweling_strike.name: Disemboweling Strike
disemboweling_strike.unique_passive: Disemboweling Strike — Your Bleed stacks deal 20% more Damage and last 50% longer

hungering_souls.name: Hungering Souls
hungering_souls.unique_passive: Hungering Souls — Your Wandering Spirits hunger for life, healing you for 2% of damage dealt

flesh_aberration.name: Flesh Aberration
flesh_aberration.unique_passive: Flesh Aberration — Your Golems are replaced by a Flesh Golem that inherits bonuses from all Golem types

morditas_reach.name: Mordita's Reach
morditas_reach.unique_passive: Mordita's Reach — Bone Curse chains to nearby enemies when the cursed enemy dies

liaths_sanctity.name: Liath's Sanctity
liaths_sanctity.unique_passive: Liath's Sanctity — Drain Life heals you for Ward instead of Health

disintegrating_aura.name: Disintegrating Aura
disintegrating_aura.unique_passive: Disintegrating Aura — Casting Disintegrate leaves a burning aura at your feet that Ignites and damages nearby enemies

covens_wrath.name: Coven's Wrath
covens_wrath.unique_passive: Coven's Wrath — Casting Sacrifice deals extra Necrotic Damage equal to 10% of target's Maximum Health

gustwave.name: Gustwave
gustwave.unique_passive: Gustwave — Your Arrows create a gust of wind on impact, pushing nearby enemies away

arbor_of_eternity.name: Arbor of Eternity
arbor_of_eternity.unique_passive: Arbor of Eternity — Your Arrows sprout roots on hit, Rooting enemies for 2 seconds

arrowguard.name: Arrowguard
arrowguard.unique_passive: Arrowguard — Blocking a Projectile attack releases a barrage of arrows in the direction it came from

woven_flesh.name: Woven Flesh
woven_flesh.unique_passive: Woven Flesh — Blocking an attack heals your Minions for 5% of their Maximum Health

quiver_of_nixes.name: Quiver of Nixes
quiver_of_nixes.unique_passive: Quiver of Nixes — Your Arrows split into 2 additional Arrows after hitting an enemy

gambler_of_fate.name: Gambler of Fate
gambler_of_fate.unique_passive: Gambler of Fate — Each time you roll a Dodge, gain 5% increased Damage for 4 seconds, stacking up to 10 times

temporal_sanctum_key.name: Temporal Sanctum Key
temporal_sanctum_key.unique_passive: Temporal Sanctum Key — Your Time Rot also applies a stack every second, dealing Void Damage

soul_gamblers_garb.name: Soul Gambler's Garb
soul_gamblers_garb.unique_passive: Soul Gambler's Garb — Each kill has a 20% chance to grant a random powerful buff for 10 seconds

prism_of_the_seeker.name: Prism of the Seeker
prism_of_the_seeker.unique_passive: Prism of the Seeker — Elemental damage bonuses you have are shared equally among Fire, Cold and Lightning

crown_of_the_pale_order.name: Crown of the Pale Order
crown_of_the_pale_order.unique_passive: Crown of the Pale Order — You cannot regenerate Life. Gain Life Leech from all sources of Damage.

shield_of_the_last_abyss.name: Shield of the Last Abyss
shield_of_the_last_abyss.unique_passive: Shield of the Last Abyss — Blocking a hit releases a Void Bolt in the direction of the attacker
